items.title: AST SpaceMobile Stock: The Stock Has Lost Touch With Reality (NASDAQ:ASTS)
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile faces significant headwinds from SpaceX's Starlink expansion, launch delays with Blue Origin, and cash burn. Read why ASTS stock is a sell.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile: The CapEx Requirement Will Lead To Further Dilution
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile receives a Sell rating due to unsustainable unit economics and excessive capital requirements. Read more on ASTS stock here.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile Makes History in 5G Broadband Cellular Connectivity from Space
items.excerpt: First-ever 5G connection for voice and data between an everyday, unmodified smartphone and a satellite in space.

items.title: T-Mobile Takes Coverage Above and Beyond With SpaceX
items.excerpt: T-Mobile and SpaceX announce Coverage Above and Beyond using Starlink direct-to-cell connectivity.
